negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_115
prompt: A wide shot captures a serene lake surrounded by a dense forested hillside under a clear blue sky. A person is seen riding a jet ski across the calm, deep blue waters, creating a trail of white spray behind them. The individual, wearing a life jacket, maintains a steady course, with the jet ski cutting through the water smoothly. The background features a mix of rocky outcrops and lush green trees, adding to the picturesque setting. As the video progresses, the jet ski continues its journey across the lake, with the wake becoming more noticeable due to increased speed. The rider remains focused, gripping the handlebars firmly, and the serene environment of the forested hillside and clear blue sky remains unchanged throughout the sequence. By the final frame, the jet ski is still moving steadily across the lake, leaving a larger wake, while the tranquil backdrop of the forested hillside and clear sky persists.
